name: Beater: Apocal Undone
short_description: Apocals have taken over the earth. Fight through hordes of Darklings in this roguelite/survival setup to cleanse the world of these apocalyptic creatures. Beater not only allows you to choose powers for your character but for the enemies as well.
detailed_description:
Beater: Apocal Undone is a horde survival game built around dark/apocalyptic theme, using roguelite setup. Pick your weapon and fight Darklings and Apocals to save the world. Each level offers you ability to choose between unique powers and stats. Every 3 levels the map changes and brings new challenges with it. Find NPC encounters who will fight along side you or assist you on your journey for coin. With calm start on lower levels game quickly turns into bullet hell-like, fast paced action on higher levels.



You play as Beater - a warrior who survived the apocalypse.
Beater uses unique way of fighting monsters, by dashing into them to deal damage.
Use left mouse button to dash towards mouse and right button to lock on closest enemy.


In this game you are also able to choose powers for the enemies as you progress through levels. The stronger the enemies are - the higher is Beater´s Ember Multiplier, so you will get more embers for every monster you kill. Embers are used in lobby to get permanent, refundable upgrades.

Game currently features:
8 Different weapons.
6 Interesting encounters.
7 Distinct monsters.
6 Unique bosses.
6 Maps with its own challenges.
25~ Powers and stats to upgrade.
18 Ember Infusion powers for easier run.
2 Cinematic videos: Intro & Ending.
21 Steam Achievements.
